title: Gonioanthela urceolata
intro: Gonioanthela urceolata, also known as the Urceolate Gonio, is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Gonioanthela urceolata include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Gonioanthela urceolata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, or as a topical application to treat skin irritations.
